From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

1980 studio album by Houston Person

| Suspicions | |
| --- | --- |
|  | |
| [Studio album](/wiki/Album "Album") by [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") | |
| Released | 1980 |
| Recorded | April 24, 1980 |
| Studio | [Van Gelder Studio](/wiki/Van_Gelder_Studio "Van Gelder Studio"), Englewood Cliffs, NJ |
| [Genre](/wiki/Music_genre "Music genre") | [Jazz](/wiki/Jazz "Jazz") |
| Length | 36:17 |
| [Label](/wiki/Record_label "Record label") | [Muse](/wiki/Muse_Records "Muse Records") MR 5199 |
| [Producer](/wiki/Record_producer "Record producer") | Houston Person |
| [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") chronology | |
| |  |  |  | | --- | --- | --- | | *[The Gospel Soul of Houston Person](/w/index.php?title=The_Gospel_Soul_of_Houston_Person&action=edit&redlink=1 "The Gospel Soul of Houston Person (page does not exist)")* (1978) | ***Suspicions*** (1980) | *[Very PERSONal](/wiki/Very_PERSONal "Very PERSONal")* (1980) | | |

***Suspicions*** is an album by saxophonist [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") recorded in 1980 and released on the [Muse](/wiki/Muse_Records "Muse Records") label.[[1]](#cite_note-1)[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)[[4]](#cite_note-4)

## Reception

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Suspicions_(album)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Reception")]

Professional ratings

| Review scores | |
| --- | --- |
| Source | Rating |
| [Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") | StarStarStar[[5]](#cite_note-Allmusic-5) |

[Allmusic](/wiki/Allmusic "Allmusic") awarded the album 3 stars noting that it contains "Some robust funk and fine soul licks, plus solid mainstream fare".[[5]](#cite_note-Allmusic-5)

## Track listing

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Suspicions_(album)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Track listing")]

1. "[Suspicions](/wiki/Suspicions_(Eddie_Rabbitt_song) "Suspicions (Eddie Rabbitt song)")" ([Eddie Rabbitt](/wiki/Eddie_Rabbitt "Eddie Rabbitt"), [David Malloy](/wiki/David_Malloy "David Malloy"), Randy McCormick, Even Stevens) - 5:26
2. "[If](/wiki/If_(Bread_song) "If (Bread song)")" ([David Gates](/wiki/David_Gates "David Gates")) - 3:55
3. "Me & Me Brudder" (Sonny Phillips) - 3:25
4. "Pieces" (Horace Ott) - 5:07
5. "[Blue Monk](/wiki/Blue_Monk "Blue Monk")" ([Thelonious Monk](/wiki/Thelonious_Monk "Thelonious Monk")) - 8:42
6. "[This Bitter Earth](/wiki/This_Bitter_Earth "This Bitter Earth")" ([Clyde Otis](/wiki/Clyde_Otis "Clyde Otis")) - 4:44
7. "Let's Love Again" (Ott) - 4:58

## Personnel

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Suspicions_(album)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Personnel")]

* [Houston Person](/wiki/Houston_Person "Houston Person") - [tenor saxophone](/wiki/Tenor_saxophone "Tenor saxophone")
* Virgil Jones - [trumpet](/wiki/Trumpet "Trumpet")
* Jack Cavari, [Melvin Sparks](/wiki/Melvin_Sparks "Melvin Sparks") - [guitar](/wiki/Guitar "Guitar")
* Ernie Hayes, [Horace Ott](/wiki/Horace_Ott "Horace Ott"), [Sonny Phillips](/wiki/Sonny_Phillips "Sonny Phillips") - [keyboards](/wiki/Keyboard_instrument "Keyboard instrument")
* [Wilbur Bascomb](/wiki/Wilbur_Bascomb "Wilbur Bascomb") - [bass](/wiki/Electric_bass "Electric bass")
* [Idris Muhammad](/wiki/Idris_Muhammad "Idris Muhammad") - [drums](/wiki/Drum_kit "Drum kit")
* Ralph Dorsey - [percussion](/wiki/Percussion "Percussion")
